titles.en: Displeasure with evil and pleasure with good define a believer
Displeasure with evil and pleasure with good define a believer

segments: وَ بِهَذَا اَلْإِسْنَادِ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ ص مَنْ سَاءَتْهُ سَيِّئَةٌ وَ سَرَّتْهُ حَسَنَةٌ فَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ.
arabic.text: وَ بِهَذَا اَلْإِسْنَادِ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ ص مَنْ سَاءَتْهُ سَيِّئَةٌ وَ سَرَّتْهُ حَسَنَةٌ فَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ.

segments: (The same previous series of relaters)… The Prophet (s) said: He who is displeased by his evil deeds and pleased by his good deeds, then he is a believer.
en.badr-shahin.text: (The same previous series of relaters)… The Prophet (s) said: He who is displeased by his evil deeds and pleased by his good deeds, then he is a believer.
